why_v1: A medium-strength hand that already reaches showdown often enough should check instead of turning itself into a thin bluff.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This hand already reaches showdown often enough and has enough showdown value, so checking is cleaner than turning it into a bluff or a thin bluff.

feedback_incorrect_by_action_v1.fold: Incorrect. Folding gives up a medium-strength hand that already reaches showdown often enough, so checking preserves the cheaper showdown path.
feedback_incorrect_by_action_v1.raise: Incorrect. Raising turns this medium-strength hand into a thin bluff, so checking is cleaner and preserves showdown value.

feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Bluffing spends a medium-strength hand that already reaches showdown often enough and has enough showdown value, so checking keeps the cheaper value path intact and is cleaner than bluffing.
